metadata.title: Process
metadata.description: A clear four-step process from discovery to launch and support.

hero.title: A clear and disciplined delivery method
hero.description: Every project follows a focused process that balances strategy, design quality, and execution speed.

steps.name: Discover
steps.objective: Align business goals, audience needs, and system constraints.
steps.deliverables: Brief, scope direction, technical decision frame

steps.name: Design
steps.objective: Shape information architecture and interface direction.

steps.name: Build
steps.objective: Develop core features with staged reviews.
steps.deliverables: Working product increments, QA reports, content integration

steps.name: Launch & Support
steps.objective: Release safely and establish post-launch rhythm.
steps.deliverables: Launch checklist, handoff docs, optimization backlog

principles.title: Operating principles
items: Transparent decisions with practical tradeoff framing
Strong technical baseline for future scale

metadata.title: Pricing
metadata.description: Premium pricing packages for websites, RAG chatbots, apps, and ongoing support.

hero.title: Premium packages with clear scope
hero.description: Pricing is structured around business outcomes, implementation depth, and long-term maintainability.

offerings.name: Websites
offerings.bestFor: Businesses building a premium digital presence
offerings.description: Strategic website projects for positioning, trust, and conversion.

offerings.name: RAG Chatbots
offerings.description: Grounded assistants that turn fragmented documents into practical answers.

offerings.name: Apps
offerings.description: Custom product and workflow app development for long-term growth.

offerings.name: Ongoing Support
offerings.description: Monthly support for optimization, feature updates, and performance care.

pricing.note: Final pricing depends on scope complexity, integration needs, and delivery timeline.

metadata.title: About

hero.title: Taiwan-based. Internationally minded.
hero.description: LINE101 Studio is an independent digital studio delivering premium web, AI, and product systems for modern businesses.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: Build digital systems that make businesses more credible, more efficient, and more ready for AI-driven operations.

whyChoose.title: Why clients choose us
